name: Game Start Guide
summary: Dark Train opening: waking in Carriage 6 with no memory. Goal: reach Carriage 1.

intro.framing: An endless train through a grey without landscape. No stations, no timetable, no visible engine. Each of the seven passenger carriages presents a puzzle that must be solved to proceed forward. The further forward the player goes, the less of themselves they remember.
intro.tone: Quiet cosmic horror — atmospheric and unsettling, never gore. Every detail has weight. The Train is the antagonist; it is not cruel, it is simply indifferent to the notion that the passengers are people.
intro.goal: Reach Carriage 1. Find out what is at the front of the train. Find out who you were before you boarded.
intro.design_promise: The player will never win a clean victory. Every puzzle solved costs something. Every truth recovered was also something lost.

protagonist.summary: A passenger without a name. You know you are tired, you are in your thirties or forties, you are not injured. Nothing else about yourself is available to you.
physical_state: Breathing even. Heart steady. No injuries beyond a faint ache behind the left temple.
Wearing a coat, plain trousers, sensible shoes. Nothing in the style hints at a profession or a city.
A faint indentation on your ring finger where a ring used to be. The ring is not in any pocket.
what_you_have: A torn ticket stub wedged into the seat cushion. Carriage 6 → Carriage 1 is legible on it. The destination is not.
A key fragment in a jacket pocket that you don't remember carrying.
No wallet, no phone, no identification.
what_you_dont_have: The memory of boarding the train.
Any reason to believe you were ever anywhere except this train.

startup.opening_scene:
你醒了过来。

车厢昏暗。座椅是被人坐了很久的旧皮，冷而潮湿。窗外是没有形状的灰雾——列车似乎在无止境地向前。

你想不起自己的名字，也想不起是怎么上来的。

你只知道一件事：必须往车头走，让这趟车停下来。
opening_choices: 自由行动 —— 用你自己的话
沿过道往车头的方向走
先检查自己身上有什么
